CONTENT.Club career: Oristanio played in the youth academy of Inter Milan until 2021.In August 2021, Oristanio joined Eerste Divisie club Volendam on loan for the 2021–22 season. He made his debut for the club as a substitute in the 66th minute of the 1–3 league loss to ADO Den Haag on 13 August 2021. Following 35 appearances, 7 goals and achieving promotion to the Eredivisie on his first season, on 15 July 2022, Oristanio re-joined Volendam on another one-year loan.On 20 July 2023, Oristanio joined Serie A club Cagliari on a one-year loan, with an option to buy and counter option in favour of Inter Milan.On 13 July 2024, he was transferred to newly promoted Serie A club Venezia for a €4 million estimated fee.

SUMMARY: Gaetano Pio Oristanio (born 28 September 2002) is an Italian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Serie A club Venezia.
